mapper.select:
SELECT notice_id , loginID , title , user , content , reg_date , view_count FROM notice
AND title LIKE concat('%',#{sname}, '%')
AND content LIKE concat('%',#{sname}, '%')
AND (title LIKE concat('%', #{sname}, '%') OR content LIKE concat('%', #{sname}, '%'))
ORDER BY reg_date
ASC DESC
LIMIT #{startNum}, #{pageSize}

select count(*) from notice
AND title LIKE concat('%',#{sname}, '%')
AND content LIKE concat('%',#{sname}, '%')
AND (title LIKE concat('%', #{sname}, '%') OR content LIKE concat('%', #{sname}, '%'))
mapper.insert: insert into notice ( loginID , title , user , content , reg_date , view_count) values ( #{loginID} , #{title} , '관리자' , #{content} , NOW() , 0)
mapper.select: SELECT n.notice_id AS noticeNo , n.title AS noticeTitle , DATE_FORMAT(n.reg_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS noticeRegdate , n.loginID AS loginId , n.user AS loginName FROM notice n ORDER BY n.reg_date DESC LIMIT #{limitCount}
